action: Retroactive build log for mobile touch implementation that was shipped but never logged, causing a false board escalation.

css: Added .touch-controls container (hidden by default, flex on mobile/touch via @media query)
Added .touch-btn (60x60px, card-bg, #333 border, 8px radius, accent :active state)
js: Added renderTouchControls(gameId) — renders game-specific d-pad layouts
Added cleanup in backToGrid() (hide restart, clear touch controls)
Touch/click handlers synthesize KeyboardEvent for zero game-logic changes

rationale: Mobile/touch devices had no way to play games — keyboard-only input. Touch controls synthesize keydown events so games need no modification.
nextStep: keyboard-focus-accessibility (design doc exists, ready for build)
